responsibilities: Design and execute synthetic chemistry experiments to develop novel compounds meeting target purity and yield specifications
Operate and maintain HPLC, GC, and spectroscopy instrumentation to perform quantitative and qualitative analysis of chemical samples
Develop and validate analytical methods to support quality control and regulatory submission requirements
Document experimental procedures and results in laboratory notebooks following Good Laboratory Practice standards
Conduct root cause investigations for out-of-specification results and recommend corrective actions
Collaborate with cross-functional R&D, process engineering, and quality teams to scale lab-scale processes to production
Interpret spectroscopic and chromatographic data to characterize chemical structures and confirm product identity
Author technical reports, SOPs, and regulatory documentation summarizing experimental findings and methodologies
Apply statistical methods and Design of Experiments to optimize reaction conditions and improve process efficiency
